nasb.text: And He gave them strict orders that no one should know about this, and He said that something should be given her to eat.

esv.text: And he strictly charged them that no one should know this, and told them to give her something to eat.

cnv.text: 耶穌再三囑咐他們，不要讓人知道這事，又吩咐給她東西吃。

ccb.text: 耶稣郑重叮嘱他们不要把这事张扬出去，又吩咐他们给女孩东西吃。

csbs.text: 耶稣郑重地吩咐他们，不要让任何人知道这事，又吩咐给孩子吃东西。
